fabiennes-cucumber-salad.name: Fabienne's Cucumber Salad
instructions: Place cucumbers in a colander; sprinkle with salt. Set aside until cucumbers release water, about 30 minutes.
Pat cucumbers dry to remove excess salt; transfer to a large bowl. Add onion, pistachios, lemon zest, lemon juice, garlic, black pepper, and cayenne pepper; stir in yogurt until evenly mixed.
Arrange lettuce leaves in a serving bowl; add cucumber salad to middle of the bowl. Surround cucumber salad with tomatoes. Refrigerate for flavors to blend, at least 30 minutes.

fancy-jellied-cranberry-sauce.name: Fancy Jellied Cranberry Sauce
instructions: Lightly coat a 4-cup mold or Bundt pan with nonstick spray. Stir gelatin and ½ cup warm water in a small bowl and let sit 10 minutes.

Set 2 Tbsp. cranberries aside for serving. Bring cardamom, bay leaves, salt, cranberry juice, 1½ cups sugar, and remaining cranberries to a boil in a large saucepan, stirring to dissolve sugar. Continue to cook, stirring often and reducing heat as needed to avoid scorching, until cranberries burst and juices begin to look syrupy, 10–12 minutes. Remove from heat and pick out cardamom and bay leaves; discard. Stir in gelatin mixture (gelatin should be completely dissolved). Slowly pour cranberry mixture into mold. Chill until completely set, at least 12 hours.
To serve, dip mold in a bowl of warm water and hold 30 seconds. Remove and place a platter upside down over top of mold. Invert jelly onto platter.
Just before serving, toss orange zest, remaining 2 Tbsp. cranberries, and remaining 3 Tbsp. sugar in a small bowl to coat. Scatter over jelly.
Do Ahead: Jelly (without sugared cranberries and zest) can be made 2 days ahead. Keep chilled.

fasting-lasagna-with-rich-cream-and-sauc.name: Fasting Lasagne With Rich Cream And Sauce
fasting-lasagna-with-rich-cream-and-sauc.original_name: Νηστίσιμα λαζάνια με πλούσια κρέμα και σάλτσα

ingredients.item: 1 kilo of freshly chopped mushroom s
1 litre soy milk or vegetable broth
1 kilo of freshly chopped mushroom s
1 litre soy milk or vegetable broth

instructions: Heat the oil in high heat and sauté the mushrooms.
Let them drink their liquids.
Add the onions and let them wither.
Add the tomatoes and simmer for 10 minutes. Salt and pepper.
Add the nuts to the sauce after cooking.

feijoada-teleculinaria.name: Feijoada
instructions: Lay the meats and sausage in a pot and add water until they are covered. Take it to the fire and let it cook, removing the meats as they get cooked.

Peel the onions and garlic, pinch everything, lie down for a pot, add the olive oil and the laurel leaves, take it to the fire and let it cook until the onion is golden. Add the naked tomato, previously drained and chopped, the colorau and cumin, stir and let cook a few minutes.

Add the meats and sausage, all cut into small pieces and mix. Add the baked beans and carrots cut into slices and stir. Add the boiling water to the meats, until it covers everything, and let it boil.

Then correct the salt and let it cook, in mild heat, for 15 minutes or until it is clear. If necessary, add more cooking water to the meat. Serve feijoada sprinkled with chopped parsley and accompanied by white rice.

fennel-and-orange-salad-with-lemon-ginge.name: Fennel And Orange Salad With Lemon-ginger Vinaigrette

ingredients.prep: trimmed, very thinly sliced, plus  0.25 cup fennel fronds
center ribs and stems removed, leaves torn into bite-size pieces (about 4 cups)

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°. Place baguette slices on a rimmed baking sheet and toast, 8–10 minutes. Let cool and break into pieces.
Meanwhile, whisk vinegar, lemon and orange zests, ginger, and pepper in a large bowl; season with salt and whisk in oil.

Using a sharp knife, cut all peel and white pith from oranges; discard. Working over bowl with dressing, cut between membranes to release segments into bowl; discard membranes. Add fennel, fennel fronds, mustard greens, and croutons to bowl; toss to combine.

fish-fillet-with-warm-portobello-sauce-a.name: Fish Fillet With Warm Portobello Sauce

ingredients.item: A few drops of white balsamic vintagegar
A few drops of white balsamic vintagegar

instructions: Cut the fishnet into nick slides.
Heat a pan with a kick base and add 1 tablespoon olive oil.
Add the pendents for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden.
Remove the meat and sauce the chopped onion in the same pan.
Add the Wooster sauce and let it decrease to half.
Then add the broth and cream, and let the mixture bottle for a few minutes until the sauce thinks. Try and correct the salt and pepper.
Clean and cut the portobello mushrooms in slides. Add some olive oil and mix well.
At high heat, heat the pan and add the mushrooms along with some garlic. Sauté for a few minutes until soft and golden.
Sprinkle with chopped parsley and sprinkle with a few drops of balsamic and some raw olive oil.
Optimally, we can add 1 tablespoon cream cheese to the warm mushrooms and stir until them have a creamy texture.
Shortly before serving, sprinkle the mushrooms with a flame parmesan.
Serve the fishnet with the nick, aromatic sauce and accompany with the portobello mushrooms.

fish-fillets-with-chives-and-ginger-tele.name: Fish Fillets With Chives And Ginger
fish-fillets-with-chives-and-ginger-tele.original_name: Filetes de pescada com cebolinho e gengibre
instructions: Season the fillets with lemon juice, chopped garlic, salt and pepper. Bring a frying pan with butter and orange juice to the fire. Peel some ginger, grate it into the sauce and season it with salt and pepper.

Add the chili, without the seeds, cut into strips, as well as the moreena flour, previously dissolved in a little water. Move until it thickens a little. Retrieve the seasonings and remove from the fire.

Pass the fillets by flour, then by the egg shakes and then again by the flour. Light a frying pan with oil and let it warm. Fry the fillets on both sides until golden. Remove and let it run on absorbent paper.
Adicione o cebolinho picado ao molho de laranja e deite sobre o peixe. Decore com rodelas ou gomos de laranja e sirva de imediato, bem quente, acompanhando com arroz negro cozido.

fish-with-hot-sauce-lezzet.name: Fish With Hot Sauce

ingredients.item: 1 kg white meat fish (lagos or levrek)

instructions: 1. Clean and split into three parts.
2. Cook for about 20 minutes, without distributing fish in jealous fire, so as to turn off over.
3. Take the fish carefully from the water.
4. Separate from leather and bristles.
5. Take 1 cup of water from the water of the fish.
6. Heat oil in a pot.
7. Very thin chopped onions, add chopped garlic and powder chalk and roast.
8. Remove tomatoes and peel the kernel and add on the onions in the form of small cubes.
9. Add salt, fish water and fish meat when tomatoes are gently softened.
10. Add spices and cook for 5 minutes in jealous fire.

fishermans-stew.name: Fisherman's Stew
instructions: Combine tomatoes, red pepper flakes, and water in a measuring cup or bowl. Puree using an immersion blender until smooth.
Cut sea bass into roughly 1 1/2-inch chunks to match the other seafood in size. Place sea bass, shrimp, calamari, mussels, and clams in individual dishes so they're ready to use.

Melt butter and olive oil in a deep pan over medium-high heat. Add sliced fennel, garlic, and salt; cook and stir until garlic takes on color, about 1 minute. Stir in white wine. Let simmer until reduced by about half, 2 to 3 minutes. Stir in tomato broth base; bring to a boil and cook until fennel is tender, 2 to 3 minutes. Taste and adjust seasonings.

Stir in parsley, sea bass, shrimp, and calamari. Add clams and mussels. Cover, increase heat to high, and cook until clam and mussel shells open and sea bass, shrimp, and calamari are opaque, about 5 minutes.
Transfer to warm serving bowls. Garnish with reserved fennel fronds and serve.

fluffy-body-with-strawberry-and-chocolat.name: Fluffy Body With Strawberry And Chocolate
fluffy-body-with-strawberry-and-chocolat.original_name: Αφράτος κορμός με φράουλα και σοκολάτα

1 cup of flower inflatable by itsself

Add the flower and cognac and generally fold the mixture with spatula, with care not to lose the volume of the beaten eggs.
Butter very well the sheet of the evening and spread parchment paper.
Butter lightly and the parchment paper.
Pour the mixture in and spread well with the spatula, to be ever everywhere.
Bake it in the ocean at 200°3′ for 10′-12′′.
While still warm and soft, spread a parchment paper on the counter and sprinkle it with crystalline sugar.
Roll up the baking cake
Remove the sheet paper.
Pour with the lukewarm strawberry jam
Spread it with seed all over the surface on the cake.

fluffy-lemon-cake-the-recipe-pequereceta.name: Fluffy Lemon Cake, The Recipe
fluffy-lemon-cake-the-recipe-pequereceta.original_name: Bizcocho de limón esponjoso, la receta perfecta

instructions: We purify the oven, heat up and down, at 180 been 3 been. We cut the yolks from the egg whites. We hit the clear with a pint of salt, as they start to be sparkling we add half of the sugar and we keep beating up and get some clear and clear. Let's have a reservation.
In another bowl we beat well the yolks, sunflower oil, milk and the other half of the sugar. We put in the polished lemon juice and the lemon fringes. We did good.
We have padded flour, Maizena and yawning with a paddle. Below we add to the bowl of yolks. We mix well, till a soft and smooth mass remains.

We add half of the clear assembled and with a spatula and wrapped movements, from bottom up and from inside out, we mix well. We add the other half of the clear we have booked and we end up mixed with wrapped movements. We have to have a soft and fluffy mass.

We grease our mold with butter or margarine. Let's get the dough and get to the oven. The target cooking time is 45 minutes. but remember that every oven's a world, after 35 minutes you can get monitoring.

fried-sole-fish-lezzet.name: Fried Sole Fish
instructions: 1. Take the edge of the fillet part in the form of a large cube by separating the tongue from the bone you clean and wash.
2. Girl Sunflower oil in a pan with non-stick surface.
3. Bute the fish meat first and get it to the tab.
4. melt butter in a separate pan.
5. Sauce the cockroach by adding the chopped peppers of the mushroom and finger thickness you're eating.
6. Continue to fade by adding coarse chopped tomatoes on it.
7. Add spices and get from the stove by asking for 1 minute.
8. The fish and vegetables that you are angry on the tab where you will serve the bone.
9. Serve your service.

frozen-raspberry-cake.name: Frozen Raspberry Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Grease an 8-inch square pan.
Mix brown sugar, flour, and butter together in a bowl to make a crumbly topping. Set aside.
Combine flour, white sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl.

Beat buttermilk, melted butter, egg, and vanilla extract together in another bowl. Stir into dry ingredients. Spread batter into the prepared pan. Sprinkle with raspberries, then with crumbly topping.
Bake in the preheated oven until well browned and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 35 to 40 minutes.

fruit-cream-cones.name: Fruit Cream Cones
instructions: Combine blueberries and strawberries in a bowl; spoon ½ into ice cream cone. Add 1 tablespoon whipped topping. Repeat layering with remaining ½ berries and remaining 1 tablespoon whipped topping; top with sprinkles.

fruity-fun-skewers.name: Fruity Fun Skewers
instructions: Thread strawberries, cantaloupe, banana, and apple pieces alternately onto skewers, placing at least 2 pieces of fruit on each skewer.
Arrange skewers decoratively on a serving platter.

fruity-tutti-turkey-brine.name: Fruity Tutti Turkey Brine
instructions: Stir the vegetable broth, candied ginger, dried cherries, dried pears, dried apples, brown sugar, kosher salt, black peppercorns, allspice berries, 3 cinnamon sticks, and 5 sage leaves together in a large stockpot until the brown sugar and salt dissolve completely; bring to a boil, reduce heat to medium-low, and cook for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.

Remove the brine from heat, add the ice water, and stir to melt ice and chill the brine; refrigerate until cold, at least 2 hours. Place the still-frozen turkey into the brine and refrigerate for 3 days. On the second day of brining, turn the turkey over in the brine.
On serving day (the third day of brining), preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Remove the turkey from the brine and place into a roasting pan. Discard the brine.

Place the onion, red apple, 1 sprig of rosemary, 2 more cinnamon sticks, and 1 sage leaf into a 5-cup microwave-safe measuring cup and fill the cup with enough water to cover. Place into microwave oven and cook on high power until hot, about 5 minutes. Pour the contents of the cup into the cavity of the turkey. Rub the skin of the turkey with the vegetable oil.

Roast in the preheated oven until the turkey is golden brown and the juices run clear, 4 to 4 1/2 hours. An instant-read meat thermometer inserted into the thickest part of a thigh should read 74°C (75 degrees C).

fudge-muffins.name: Fudge Muffins
instructions: Preheat oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Line 2 mini muffin tins with mini foil liners.

Place sugar, butter, and semisweet chocolate in top of a double boiler over simmering water. Stir frequently, scraping down the sides with a rubber spatula to avoid scorching, until chocolate is melted, about 5 minutes. Stir in flour and salt. Remove from heat and let cool, about 10 minutes.
Stir eggs 1 at a time into the chocolate mixture; add pecans and vanilla extract. Drop spoonfuls of batter into the prepared mini muffin tins.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 25 minutes.

fun-finger-gelatin.name: Fun Finger Gelatin
instructions: Dissolve the unflavored gelatin in 2 ½ cups cold water in a bowl.

Combine the fruit-flavored Jell-O, sugar, and hot water in a large saucepan; bring to a boil. Stir the unflavored gelatin mixture into the boiling mixture; cook and stir until the gelatin and sugar are completely dissolved, about 5 minutes.
Remove the saucepan from heat. Stir 1 cup cold water into the gelatin mixture; pour into a 13x9-inch dish.
Refrigerate until the gelatin is firm, about 3 hours; cut into squares to serve.

fuzzy-navel-cocktail.name: Fuzzy Navel Cocktail
instructions: Combine schnapps and orange juice in a highball glass.
Add ice; stir to combine.
Garnish with an orange slice.
